hts: Artisan gelato since 1996. Thirty years of passion and absolute quality on Lake Garda.
ab_p1: I'm Fabrizio Bottesi and for thirty years I've been crafting artisan gelato in the heart of Malcesine, one of the most beautiful villages on Lake Garda. My gelateria is more than a place for a sweet treat — it's the result of a life dedicated to absolute quality.
ab_p2: Every flavour is born from careful selection of raw ingredients, respect for the seasons, and an artisan technique refined over time. No compromises: only authentic ingredients and a whole lot of passion.
p1x: Only the finest quality ingredients, carefully chosen and respectful of the seasons. No additives, no shortcuts.
p2x: Every day, every flavour is prepared by hand following recipes perfected over thirty years of experience.
p3x: Rooted in Lake Garda, inspired by the flavours of the land. Gelato as an authentic expression of a place.
r1: "The best gelato on Lake Garda. The artisan care is felt in every flavour. We'll definitely be back!"
r2: "The best gelato on Lake Garda without doubt. Fabrizio's passion shines through every flavour. A must-visit in Malcesine."
r3: "Das beste Eis am Gardasee — frisch, cremig, mit echten Zutaten. Fabrizio ist ein wahrer Meister seines Fachs!"
so_ig_p: Discover our daily creations, new flavors, and laboratory secrets.
so_fb_p: Stay updated on events, special openings, and news from the gelateria.
f_ab: The true taste of artisan gelato on Lake Garda, prepared with passion every day.
